have h_main : ∀ (x : ℝ), x > 0 → 2 - Real.sqrt 2 ≥ 2 - x - 1 / (2 * x) := by
    intro x hx
    have h₁ : 0 < x := hx
    have h₂ : 0 < 2 * x := by positivity
    have h₃ : 0 < Real.sqrt 2 := Real.sqrt_pos.mpr (by norm_num)
    -- Use the fact that the square of any real number is non-negative to establish the inequality
    have h₄ : (Real.sqrt 2 * x - 1) ^ 2 ≥ 0 := by nlinarith [Real.sq_sqrt (show 0 ≤ 2 by norm_num)]
    -- Expand the square and rearrange terms to match the desired inequality
    have h₅ : 2 * x ^ 2 - 2 * Real.sqrt 2 * x + 1 ≥ 0 := by
      nlinarith [Real.sq_sqrt (show 0 ≤ 2 by norm_num),
        sq_nonneg (Real.sqrt 2 * x - 1)]
    -- Multiply both sides of the target inequality by 2 * x to eliminate the denominator
    have h₆ : 2 * x ^ 2 + 1 ≥ 2 * Real.sqrt 2 * x := by
      linarith
    -- Divide both sides by 2 * x to get back to the original form
    have h₇ : x + 1 / (2 * x) ≥ Real.sqrt 2 := by
      have h₇₁ : 0 < 2 * x := by positivity
      have h₇₂ : 0 < x := h₁
      field_simp at h₆ ⊢
      rw [le_div_iff (by positivity)] at *
      nlinarith [Real.sq_sqrt (show 0 ≤ 2 by norm_num)]
    -- Rearrange the terms to match the original inequality
    have h₈ : 2 - Real.sqrt 2 ≥ 2 - x - 1 / (2 * x) := by
      have h₈₁ : Real.sqrt 2 ≤ x + 1 / (2 * x) := h₇
      have h₈₂ : 2 - Real.sqrt 2 ≥ 2 - (x + 1 / (2 * x)) := by linarith
      have h₈₃ : 2 - (x + 1 / (2 * x)) = 2 - x - 1 / (2 * x) := by ring
      linarith
    exact h₈
  -- Use the main result to conclude the proof
  intro x hx
  exact h_main x hx

intro x hx
  have h_main : x + 1 / (2 * x) ≥ Real.sqrt 2 := by
    have h₁ : 0 < x := hx
    have h₂ : 0 < 2 * x := by positivity
    have h₃ : 0 < 1 / (2 * x) := by positivity
    have h₄ : 0 < Real.sqrt 2 := Real.sqrt_pos.mpr (by norm_num)
    have h₅ : 0 < x * (2 * x) := by positivity
    -- Use the AM-GM inequality to show that x + 1 / (2x) ≥ sqrt(2)
    have h₆ : x + 1 / (2 * x) ≥ Real.sqrt 2 := by
      -- Use the fact that the square of the difference is non-negative
      have h₇ : 0 ≤ (x - Real.sqrt 2 / 2) ^ 2 := by positivity
      have h₈ : 0 ≤ (x + 1 / (2 * x)) ^ 2 := by positivity
      -- Expand and simplify the inequality
      have h₉ : (x - Real.sqrt 2 / 2) ^ 2 ≥ 0 := by positivity
      have h₁₀ : (x + 1 / (2 * x)) ^ 2 ≥ 2 := by
        field_simp [h₁.ne']
        rw [le_div_iff (by positivity)]
        nlinarith [sq_sqrt (show 0 ≤ 2 by norm_num),
          sq_nonneg (x - Real.sqrt 2 / 2),
          sq_nonneg (x + Real.sqrt 2 / 2)]
      -- Take square roots to conclude the proof
      have h₁₁ : x + 1 / (2 * x) ≥ 0 := by positivity
      have h₁₂ : Real.sqrt 2 ≥ 0 := Real.sqrt_nonneg 2
      nlinarith [Real.sq_sqrt (show 0 ≤ 2 by norm_num),
        sq_nonneg (x + 1 / (2 * x) - Real.sqrt 2)]
    exact h₆
  
  have h_final : 2 - Real.sqrt 2 ≥ 2 - x - 1 / (2 * x) := by
    have h₁ : x + 1 / (2 * x) ≥ Real.sqrt 2 := h_main
    have h₂ : 2 - Real.sqrt 2 ≥ 2 - (x + 1 / (2 * x)) := by
      linarith
    have h₃ : 2 - (x + 1 / (2 * x)) = 2 - x - 1 / (2 * x) := by
      ring
    linarith
  
  exact h_final

    have h₄ : 0 < 1 / (2 * x) := by positivity
    have h₅ : x + 1 / (2 * x) ≥ 2 * Real.sqrt (x * (1 / (2 * x))) := by
      have h₅₁ : 0 ≤ x := by positivity
      have h₅₂ : 0 ≤ 1 / (2 * x) := by positivity
      have h₅₃ : Real.sqrt (x * (1 / (2 * x))) ≤ (x + 1 / (2 * x)) / 2 := by
        apply Real.sqrt_le_iff.mpr
        constructor
        · positivity
        · nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - 1 / (2 * x))]
      nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - 1 / (2 * x))]
    have h₆ : 2 * Real.sqrt (x * (1 / (2 * x))) = Real.sqrt 2 := by
      have h₆₁ : x * (1 / (2 * x)) = 1 / 2 := by
        field_simp [h₂.ne']
        <;> ring
        <;> field_simp [h₂.ne']
        <;> ring
      rw [h₆₁]
      have h₆₂ : Real.sqrt (1 / 2 : ℝ) = Real.sqrt 2 / 2 := by
        rw [Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq (by positivity) (by positivity)]
        ring_nf
        <;> norm_num
        <;> linarith [Real.sqrt_nonneg 2, Real.sq_sqrt (show 0 ≤ 2 by norm_num)]
      rw [h₆₂]
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> field_simp [Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq]
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> norm_num
      <;> linarith [Real.sqrt_nonneg 2, Real.sq_sqrt (show 0 ≤ 2 by norm_num)]
    linarith
  
  have h_final : ∀ x > 0, 2 - Real.sqrt 2 ≥ 2 - x - 1 / (2 * x) := by
    intro x hx

    have h₂ : 2 - Real.sqrt 2 ≥ 2 - x - 1 / (2 * x) := by
      -- Use the inequality from h₁ to prove the desired inequality

    exact h₂
  
  exact h_final

    rw [h₈]

    have h₇ : 2 - (x + 1 / (2 * x)) = 2 - x - 1 / (2 * x) := by ring

  intro x hx

    rw [le_div_iff (by positivity)]

  -- Use the established inequality to prove the final result

  exact h₈

have h_main : ∀ (x : ℝ), x > 0 → 2 - Real.sqrt 2 ≥ 2 - x - 1 / (2 * x) := by
    intro x hx
    have h₁ : 0 < x := hx
    have h₂ : 0 < 2 * x := by linarith
    have h₃ : 0 < Real.sqrt 2 := Real.sqrt_pos.mpr (by norm_num)
    -- Use the fact that the square of any real number is non-negative to establish the inequality
    have h₄ : 0 ≤ (x * Real.sqrt 2 - 1) ^ 2 := by nlinarith
    -- Expand the square and rearrange to get 2x² - 2√2x + 1 ≥ 0
    have h₅ : 0 ≤ 2 * x ^ 2 - 2 * Real.sqrt 2 * x + 1 := by
      nlinarith [Real.sq_sqrt (show 0 ≤ 2 by norm_num),
        Real.sqrt_nonneg 2,
        sq_nonneg (x * Real.sqrt 2 - 1)]
    -- Divide by 2x to get x - √2 + 1/(2x) ≥ 0
    have h₆ : x - Real.sqrt 2 + 1 / (2 * x) ≥ 0 := by
      have h₇ : 0 < 2 * x := by linarith
      have h₈ : 0 < x := by linarith
      have h₉ : 0 < 2 * x := by linarith
      field_simp at h₅ ⊢
      rw [le_div_iff (by positivity)] at *
      nlinarith [Real.sq_sqrt (show 0 ≤ 2 by norm_num)]
    -- Rearrange to get 2 - √2 ≥ 2 - x - 1/(2x)
    have h₇ : 2 - Real.sqrt 2 ≥ 2 - x - 1 / (2 * x) := by
      linarith
    exact h₇
  -- Apply the main result to conclude the proof
  intro x hx
  exact h_main x hx
